summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that refresh-plan output records the state-transition facts needed before an agent refreshes or reviews prior claim state.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the deterministic refresh-plan packet fields named by the contract are marked satisfied. This does not prove the live bundled skill always selects the refresh branch correctly.
notClaimed: Every future skill host selects refresh from prior JSON without human error
The refresh plan mutates the saved claim map

notableAssertions: refresh-plan packets expose baseCommit, targetCommit, targetPolicy, workingTreePolicy, changedSources, claimPlan, refreshSummary, claimState, and effectiveScanScope
changed claim sources become changed lifecycle entries while unchanged claims are counted as carried forward
refreshSummary records changed source, changed claim, carried-forward claim, and stale evidence counts
staleEvidence records claim ids and concrete stale evidence reasons such as changed contentHash
committed claim-packet drift is recorded without marking source claims changed

decision.reason: The focused runtime tests prove the refresh-plan packet records baseline and target commits, target policy, changed-source and carried-forward state, dirty working tree policy, and stale evidence reasons without mutating saved claim state.
